v{{ version }} - Semantic UI components

dot·ui

UI components using HTML semantic elements.
No framework. No dependencies. Just HTML.

npm install @usedot/ui@{{ version }}
Get started → GitHub ↗

Components

Button

Action trigger with variants and sizes.

Default Success Warning Danger

Badge

Inline status labels and counters.

Note: This is a contextual message.

Alert

Contextual feedback messages.

Card

Content container with header and footer.

Form

Input, textarea, select, and form helpers.

API content

    Dropdown

    Popover-based contextual menu.

    Toast: Action completed successfully.

    Toast
